series_metadata.series_title: Educational Cost - Juvenile Court Subsidy Claim
series_metadata.series_description: Documentation provided for use by the courts in Ohio to certify to the Ohio Department of Education, Division of Field Relations, the daily per capita cost of each student placed by the court in a private institution or facility, and for the purpose of claiming the subsidy provided for in Section 2151.35.7 O.R.C.
